metadata.title: Ablio — Learn and Grow with Fun Games
metadata.description: Ablio helps improve cognitive and mental abilities through interactive games designed for people with Down Syndrome.

hero.title: Learn and Grow with Fun Games
hero.description: Ablio helps you build your brain power through colorful, easy-to-play games. Made for you, at your own speed.

about.title: What is Ablio?
about.description: Ablio is a fun platform that helps you build your thinking skills. We use simple games to make learning feel like play.

features.title: Brain Training
features.description: Games that help you think faster and remember better.

features.title: Fun Games
features.description: Play colorful games that are easy to understand and enjoy.

features.title: Track Your Progress
features.description: See how much you have improved over time with simple charts.

services.title: What We Offer
services.description: Fun activities to help you learn and grow. Start your free trial and unlock all games!

items.title: Memory Games
items.description: Match cards and remember patterns to make your memory stronger.

items.title: Number Games
items.description: Learn to count, add, and compare numbers with easy puzzles.

items.title: Word Games
items.description: Practice letters, words, and simple reading through fun challenges.

items.title: Art and Colors
items.description: Draw, paint, and learn about colors in a creative space.

items.title: Sound and Music
items.description: Play with sounds and rhythms to sharpen your listening skills.

testimonials.title: What Parents Say
testimonials.description: Hear from families and therapists who use Ablio every day.

items.author: Sarah M., Parent
items.description: My son loves the games! He plays every day and I can see how much his memory has improved. The simple design makes it easy for him to use on his own.

items.author: David K., Therapist
items.description: I recommend Ablio to the families I work with. The games are well designed for cognitive training and the kids really enjoy playing them.

items.author: Maria L., Parent
items.description: Great app for my daughter. She finds the colors and sounds very fun. It is wonderful to see her learn while having a good time.

dashboard.title: My Space Journey
dashboard.description: Choose your destination and start exploring the galaxy!

earth.title: Earth
earth.description: Dive into the blue planet! Explore deep oceans, green forests, and busy cities.

mars.title: Mars
mars.description: The mysterious Red Planet. Discover dusty deserts and giant mountains.

moon.title: The Moon
moon.description: Leap through low gravity and explore the silver craters of our Moon.
